name: Boston Brown Bread
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the cornmeal and flour with the baking soda and salt; sift together.
2. Stir in the parboiled raisins, which have been dried off with a paper towel.
3. Mix the molasses and milk, then add to the flour mixture.
4. Steam the bread in three well-greased covered one-quart molds, filled 2/3 full to allow room for expansion, for 3 hours.
5. Remove the molds from the steamer and bake at 250°F for 25-30 minutes.
6. Re-steam any of the loaves not used immediately after baking before serving.
